atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are most consistent with an acute heart failure exacerbation

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: likely secondary to underlying congestive heart failure

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: exacerbated by dietary indiscretions

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am ordering Lasix 40 milligrams daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will recommend close monitoring and frequent follow-up to assess response to treatment and adjust as needed

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: If his weight does not improve or if he experiences worsening shortness of breath at rest, I want him to call me or go to the emergency room immediately
